ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the tournament took place */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "host" TEXT /* Location where the tournament was hosted */,
  "weight_class" TEXT /* Weight class for the tournament (e.g., Lightweight) */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., National, International, Friendly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizing body of the tournament */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the tournament's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the result was recorded */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who competed */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the athlete in the tournament */,
  "results" TEXT /* Calculated results from the lifts (in kg) */,
  "snatch" REAL /* Weight lifted in the snatch event */,
  "clean_and_jerk" REAL /* Weight lifted in the clean and jerk event */,
  "total_weight" REAL /* Total weight lifted (sum of snatch and clean and jerk) */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class for the result */,
  "competition_format" TEXT /* Format of the competition (e.g., Single, Double) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result has been verified by officials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country representing the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's coach */,
  "registered_since" TEXT /* Date when the athlete registered with the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight class (e.g., Lightweight) */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight limit for this class (in kg) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight class */,
  "minimum_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight limit for this class (in kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete whose rank is recorded */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament associated with the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the athlete in the tournament */,
  "points" REAL /* Points awarded based on the rank achieved */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the rank was awarded */,
  "points_earned" REAL /* Points earned in the tournament */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the athlete */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_ranks_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_ranks_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
